label: What-If Slider
description: BTC price shock slider with estimated P&L via delta and gamma approximation. Instant scenario sensitivity.

0.1.note: — WidgetErrorBoundary in widget-wrapper.tsx covers all grid widgets.

0.5.note: — no direct lib/mocks imports in widget file.

0.6.note: applied — added isLoading -> Spinner guard (widget computes from portfolioGreeks which requires API data).

0.7.note: — widget is a pure interactive control with numeric defaults (btcPriceChangePct=0, estimatedPnl=0); no data array to be empty.

0.8.note: applied — added hasError -> rose-400 message guard.

l0.notes: 0.1 pass — WidgetErrorBoundary in widget-wrapper.tsx covers all grid widgets. 0.2 pass — requiredEntitlements: [execution-basic, execution-full]. 0.3 pass — availableOn: [risk]. 0.4 pass — no any types or @ts-ignore. 0.5 pass — no direct lib/mocks imports in widget file. 0.6 fix applied — added isLoading -> Spinner guard (widget computes from portfolioGreeks which requires API data). 0.7 N/A — widget is a pure interactive control with numeric defaults (btcPriceChangePct=0, estimatedPnl=0); no data array to be empty. 0.8 fix applied — added hasError -> rose-400 message guard. 0.9 pass — no dead code.

1.1.note: — reads btcPriceChangePct, setBtcPriceChangePct, estimatedPnl, portfolioGreeks, portfolioGreeksData exclusively from useRiskData() hook.

1.2.note: — use-risk-page-data.ts calls useGlobalScope(); isBatchMode derived from scope.mode; portfolioGreeks from scoped API.

1.3.note: — org scope reduces scopeReductionFactor which scales VaR/risk metrics that feed estimatedPnl.

1.6.note: — empty scope = full portfolio Greeks returned.

1.7.note: — no reference data; btcSpot=65000 is a display constant for dS calculation, not a reference data list.

l1.notes: 1.1 pass — reads btcPriceChangePct, setBtcPriceChangePct, estimatedPnl, portfolioGreeks, portfolioGreeksData exclusively from useRiskData() hook. 1.2 pass — use-risk-page-data.ts calls useGlobalScope(); isBatchMode derived from scope.mode; portfolioGreeks from scoped API. 1.3 pass — org scope reduces scopeReductionFactor which scales VaR/risk metrics that feed estimatedPnl. 1.4 pass — clientIds threaded through scope. 1.5 pass — strategyIds threaded through scope. 1.6 pass — empty scope = full portfolio Greeks returned. 1.7 N/A — no reference data; btcSpot=65000 is a display constant for dS calculation, not a reference data list.

l2.notes: Covered globally by commits 32ba8ab (structured {domain, tier} entitlements across all 17 register.ts files + 5 PageEntitlementGate wrappers) and f9f29ea (65 automated tests in __tests__/integration/entitlement-wiring.test.ts, __tests__/components/platform/*entitlement-gate.test.tsx, __tests__/lib/config/trading-entitlements.test.ts). Re-audit per-widget only if the wiring test fails or entitlements are added.

findings: L0.6: Added isLoading -> Spinner guard (was missing; greeks/portfolio data needed before slider is meaningful)
L0.7: N/A — pure interactive control, no data array empty state applicable
L0.8: Added hasError -> error message guard (was missing)
